# Visant Labs

> Visant Labs is an AI design platform that turns brand guidelines into production-ready mockups, creatives, and brand identities — accessible via MCP, REST API, or web UI.

## Live endpoints

- MCP Server: `POST https://api.visantlabs.com/api/mcp` (Streamable HTTP, MCP 2025-11-25)
- Full LLM reference: https://api.visantlabs.com/llms-full.txt
- OpenAPI spec: https://api.visantlabs.com/api/docs/api/spec
- Public brand context demo (no auth): https://api.visantlabs.com/api/brand-guidelines/public/visant/context?output=text

## Repository structure

- `/server` — Express.js backend (API + MCP server)
- `/server/mcp/platform-mcp.ts` — All MCP tool definitions (116 tools, all annotated)
- `/server/routes/` — REST API routes
- `/server/lib/brandContextBuilder.ts` — Brand context builder (LLM-ready output)
- `/src` — React frontend (Vite + Tailwind)
- `/prisma` — Database schema (MongoDB via Prisma)
- `/tests` — Vitest suites

## Key concepts

- **Brand Guidelines as AI input**: guidelines are structured data that feed into mockup/creative generation — not just static documentation.
- **MCP-first**: the platform is designed for agent access. All 116 tools have `readOnlyHint`/`destructiveHint` annotations.
- **OAuth 2.1**: PKCE + Dynamic Client Registration for Claude Connector Directory compatibility.
